ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Final Account Of Deceased Administrator By His Personal Representative
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Cathrine Kit Lin Yee appeared via zoom for Norman Pon (Petitioner).

Ms. Yee stated that the client informed three weeks after the death of his father, that she verified that decedent signed the verified petition prior to his death, and that she will file a new waiver of account.

The First and Final Report of Administrator etc., is ordered off calendar.

Petition for Letter of Administration is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Status hearing on final account of deceased administrator by his personal representative is set for September 9, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Status hearing on close of estate is set for January 20, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Continued To Feb-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Catherine Kit Lin Yee appeared via zoom for Norman Pon (petitioner).

Ms. Yee stated that her client needs post full bond and needs more time to complete the application. Petition for letters of administration is continued to February 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Order to appear is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Continued To Dec-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Cathrine Kit Lin Yee (attorney) to appear on December 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 pursuant to CCP 128 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. An Order to Appear will be issued to Norman S. H. Pon (petitioner) to appear on December 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Continued To Nov-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court informed Mrs. Yee that a bond in the amount of $1,400,000.00 is required pursuant to the Probate Code if her client wants to be appointed with full IAEA authority, or he can be appointed with limited IAEA authority. The court also noted that Sidney Pon has not waived bond. Mrs. Yee stated that it does not appear that they will be able to get Sidney to waive bond as the relationship between the brothers is estranged, provided a description of the property, and spoke of her client's financial status. Mrs. Yee also requested a continuance to have the opportunity to discuss the matter with her client. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to November 29, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Nov-01-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
